allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix module imports and add auto-install for dependencies

- Convert all absolute imports \(from desktop.X\) to relative imports
  since the plugin lives directly in the plugins directory, not in a
  ''desktop'' package
- Add auto-install of dependencies from requirements.txt on first run,
  with support for both uv and pip package managers
- Fix signal handler error when running agent in QThread by patching
  signal.signal\(\) to be a no-op in worker threads

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
